+import structlog
+logger = structlog.get_logger()
+
+def sync_inventory(warehouse_id: str) -> None:
+    log = logger.bind(warehouse_id=warehouse_id)
+    log.info("inventory_sync_started")
+    items = fetch_items(warehouse_id)
+    log.info("inventory_items_fetched", count=len(items))
+    for item in items:
+        update_stock(item)
+    log.info("inventory_sync_completed", items_processed=len(items))

description: Proper structured logging with structlog and context binding

input_payload.diff:
+class TransferRequest(BaseModel):
+    from_account: str = Field(min_length=10, max_length=20)
+    to_account: str = Field(min_length=10, max_length=20)
+    amount: Decimal = Field(gt=0, le=1000000)
+    currency: str = Field(pattern="^[A-Z]{3}$")
+
+@router.post("/transfer", status_code=201)
+async def transfer_funds(body: TransferRequest) -> TransferResponse:
+    """Transfer funds between accounts."""
+    result = await account_service.transfer(body)
+    return TransferResponse.from_domain(result)

description: API endpoint with proper Pydantic request model and validation

input_payload.diff:
+class PaymentDeclinedError(DomainError):
+    def __init__(self, reason: str, decline_code: str) -> None:
+        super().__init__(f"Payment declined: {reason}")
+        self.decline_code = decline_code
+
+async def process_payment(payment: Payment) -> PaymentResult:
+    try:
+        charge = await stripe_client.charge(payment)
+        return PaymentResult.success(charge.id)
+    except StripeCardError as e:
+        logger.warning("payment_declined", decline_code=e.code, payment_id=payment.id)
+        raise PaymentDeclinedError(reason=str(e), decline_code=e.code) from e
+    except StripeNetworkError as e:
+        logger.error("stripe_network_error", error=str(e))
+        raise ServiceUnavailableError("Payment processor unreachable") from e

description: Well-structured error handling with custom exception hierarchy
